prompt: I'm writing a post about whether AI agents will replace junior developers. Find me the strongest supporting and opposing viewpoints on X. Use --dry-run since we're testing.
assertions: The skill decomposes the question into multiple search queries (at least 2 different angles)
Results include both supporting AND opposing viewpoints
Output is structured JSON with tweet data including engagement metrics
Each finding includes a tweet URL
The skill uses the x-search.ts CLI tool with --dry-run flag
